title: The Shockwave Rider
author: John Brunner
description: EARLY IN THE TWENTY-FIRST CENTURY, NICKIE HAFLINGER IS SELECTED TO ENTER TARNOVER, AN INSTITUTION DEDICATED TO THE MOLDING OF POTENTIAL GENIUSES. WHEN HE LEAVES, HE STEALS A CODE THAT HELPS HIM REWRITE HIS IDENTITY BY WIPING OUT OLD DATA.
